---
title: "ETC5513_Assignment1_Appendix"
author: Noor Fatima Moolji
format:
  html:
    theme: cerulean
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

# AI Declaration Statement

I used AI to improve the communication aspect of my assignment, not to generate any analysis.

Specifically, I asked AI to :

- improve the grammar and readability of my sentences

- check that my explanations/paragraphs were easy to understand

Here is the link to my [prompts](https://chatgpt.com/share/69d091af-f06c-8323-966a-09e149c7384b)
